destinations.evidence: Full scheduled verification enforces C8 target equality with the configured Scheduler address.
destinations.snippet: let scheduler = scheduler_contract.unwrap_or_else(get_scheduler_address); ... if info.target != Some(scheduler) { return Err(ScheduledConstraintViolation::InvalidTarget { ... }); }

equivalence_argument: Mapped in port full scheduled verification.
rationale: The cluster contains one candidate and no bounded successor or conflict.
statement: Full scheduled transaction verification rejects scheduled transactions whose target address is not the configured Scheduler contract address, and accepts the target-address check when the target is the configured Scheduler address.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct Scheduler and non-Scheduler target fixtures for full verification.
summary: Scheduled target validation is mapped in the port.
title: Scheduled verification requires Scheduler target
